0x08020201.desc: Failed to estimate the deadband size of a motor.

payload.name: collected
payload.desc: The number of valid samples collected during the estimation process.

payload.name: expected
payload.desc: The expected number of samples to be collected for a reliable estimation.

0x08020201.name: DeadbandSizeEstimation
0x08020201.fix: Check motor, analog reader, and motor driver wiring and ensure that everything is properly connected.

0x08020301.desc: Failed to estimate the feedback latency of a motor, no movement detected before timeout limit reached.

payload.name: timeout
payload.desc: The timeout value in milliseconds that was reached during the latency estimation process.

0x08020301.name: LatencyTimeout
0x08020301.fix: Check motor, analog reader, and motor driver wiring and ensure that everything is properly connected.

0x08020401.desc: Failed to detect a physical bound of a motor, reached duty cycle limit without finding bound.

payload.name: direction
payload.desc: The direction in which the bound was being searched (1 for max, -1 for min).

payload.name: bound_value
payload.desc: The duty cycle value at which the search was stopped due to reaching the limit.

0x08020401.name: PhysicalBoundNotFound
0x08020401.fix: Check motor assembly and ensure that the motor is centered, and check power board wiring.

0x08020503.desc: Motor calibration sequence failed. See above errors for more details.
0x08020503.name: CalibrationFailed
0x08020503.fix: Check motor assembly, wiring, and ensure that the motor is centered and properly connected.

0x11010101.desc: Indicates that an error occurred while configuring the GPIO pins for the ADC multiplexer.

payload.name: err
payload.desc: The esp_err_t error code returned by the GPIO configuration operation.

0x11010101.name: GPIOConfigFailed
0x11010101.fix: Check for any GPIO configuration issues and ensure the GPIO pins are properly initialized.

0x11010201.desc: Indicates that an error occurred while initializing the ADC oneshot unit.

0x11010401.fix: Check for any ADC calibration issues and ensure the calibration handle is properly initialized.

0x11020101.fix: Check for any ADC configuration issues and ensure the ADC is properly initialized.

0x11020201.desc: Indicates that an error occurred while converting the raw ADC value to a voltage.

0x11020201.name: ConversionFailed
0x11020201.fix: Check for any calibration issues and ensure the ADC calibration is properly initialized.

0x11020301.desc: Indicates that an error occurred while selecting the ADC channel using GPIO pins.

payload.name: err

0x11020301.name: GPIOSelectFailed
0x11020301.fix: Check for any GPIO configuration issues and ensure the GPIO pins are properly initialized.
